title: Debug a misbehaving generator expression
description: A procedure to inspect what a generator expression evaluates to and fix conditions that were written as configure-time strings.
body: Use when a target property set with a generator expression produces the wrong flags per configuration. Do not assume genex evaluates at configure time. Steps: remember genex evaluates at generation time, after configure; write the value to a file with file(GENERATE) to observe the result per config; correct conditionals like $<CONFIG:Debug> rather than comparing CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE as a string. Validation signals include the correct flags appearing only in the intended configuration. Risk boundary: confusing configure-time and generate-time logic yields flags that silently apply to the wrong build type, so verify per-config output.
